Name: UCSB
Description: A great university located along the California coast!

Name: San Francisco Ferry Building
Description: Not only is it a terminal for ferries, it is also a food hall that has an amazing confiserie, Miette!

Name: Louvre Museum
Description: This is probably the most iconic art museum exhibiting the Mona Lisa and Venus de Milo.

Name: The British Museum
Description: Housing many important artifacts like the Rosetta Stone, this museum is a must visit for any history enthusiast.
Image Credit: By Luke Massey & the Greater London National Park City Initiative - This file has been extracted from another file, CC BY 2.0, https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?curid=77112807

Name: Sydney Habour Bridge
Description: The view you can see from the top of this steel arch bridge is amazing especially during the sunset!

Name: Empire State Building
Description: Probably one of the most iconic buildings as well as views in New York.
